text: Diniyah education is a key part of the education system in Muslim‑majority countries. Policy makers use Diniyah education to raise formal education and to boost religious values. This article gives a short history, role and change of early education policy. By joining the national education system, early education helps people learn about religion, morality and religious identity. The policy also helps raise the quality of formal education and strengthens religious values and morality in society. There are challenges in implementation, but I think supporting diniyah education initiatives matters for building a society that follows religious values. ABSTRAK Pendidikan diniyah is a key part of the education system in countries where most people are Muslim. I see that policy makers focus on improving formal education and strengthening religious values through Pendidikan diniyah. This article presents a review of the history, role, and evolution of Pendidikan diniyah policy. Through integration into the national education system, Pendidikan diniyah helps people understand religion, practice morality, and develop a religious identity. Implikasi kebijakan ini juga terlihat dalam peningkatan kualitas pendidikan formal serta penguatan nilai-nilai keagamaan dan moralitas di masyarakat. Meskipun ada tantangan dalam implementasi, mendukung inisiatif pendidikan diniyah penting untuk membangun masyarakat yang berlandaskan pada nilai-nilai keagamaan.
